feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: BW4HANA - SICF - Maintain master data error
entry.content:
Hi @alopezbarranco 

In the URL It self it states - ZREPOS

Thanks, 
Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: S_alr_87012179 report output. I am not able to view it as rows and columns
entry.content:
Hi,

For report output s_alr_87012179 in order to view it as rows and columns what should i do?

Thank you,

Alex

entry.title: CVI - Re-Run of Synchronization after post conversion
entry.content:
Dear All,

In CVI during brownfield implementation we do synchronization of customers & vendors to BP on ERP system as  pre conversion activity.

Post conversion on S/4 HANA do we need to Re-run synchronization? because we observed bank details are not getting updated correctly in BUT0BK table whenever it get changed in customers KNBK or vendors LFBK after synchronization on ERP.

Thank you

entry.title: Warning message : Duplicate check not possible; required fields Tax number not filled
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

We are encountering a warning message " Duplicate check not possible; required fields Tax number not filled "  even though post populating the tax number along with tax category. Can anyone help why this warning message is popped up and how to resolve this issue.

Thanks & Regards, 

Resh

entry.title: Could I Issue permits for a work order list at same time like a mass change?
Bank Master Data Cockpit
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are planning to implement Bank Master Data Cockpit (Fiori App DBIC2 ) however we cannot  find any documentation about how to load a file via batch job. We have manually loaded file with bank data, but we want to automate the process of loading the file via batch job. Can you please let us know whether this is possible?

Thanks.

entry.title: How to mass upload planned prices (future) in costing 2 view for materials?
entry.content: I have a requirement where the business wants to upload planned price (future) in costing 2 view of material master in mass. Are there any standard upload template or t-code available or do we need to upload it via LSMW / BDC? I have checked MM17 and MASS t-codes but planned price field is not available to upload in mass in these t-codes.

entry.title: What is the difference between creating BOM in CS01 vs C201?
entry.content:
When creating the BOM, why are there two methods (CS01 vs C201)?  What are the advantages/disadvantages of one over the other?  

Are there some example scenarios that can help me understand how these are applied and how to decide between which one to use?

entry.title: Merging Customer & Vendor into single BP
entry.content:
Hello,

During CVI pre-conversion activity on ECC/ERP system, If we want to merge customers and vendors into single BP which are having same legal entity (address) then in customization path do we need to assign customer & vendor account group to the same BP Grouping? Not all customers & vendors from those account groups are eligible to merge into single BP.

Thank you

entry.title: How to enhance the Request Material(MDG) App Lean App ID(F0502)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Example Requirement: Enhance the Standard "Request Material(MDG)" app to have a Custom field and send to MDG backend staging table. From MDG the custom field will be mapped to standard Manufacture part number.

1) Front end: Is there any way to Enhance "Request Material(MDG)" via BAS and in BAS this app itself is not loading via adaptation project as the Fiori Library shows Enhancement points. In WEB IDE can we do extensions, we are using development tool BAS and how to get the license for webide full stack in BTP.

2) Backend: The Service Associated With the app is MDG_MATERIAL_SRV which should be extended with Z service can we use CFL instead of Append structure.

entry.title: How to add custom field in request material mdg fiori app
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

Can you please help me in adding custom field in request material standard fiori app using custom field logic

entry.title: Hello Experts, Is there a way to extend sap fiori app ( Request Material MDG ) in BAS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there a way to extend sap fiori app ( Request Material MDG ) in BAS. 

when creating adaptation project in BAS we are not getting the option to extend for this particular app. 

or is there any other way to extend this app. 

P.S : SAP WEB IDE is not available as account is in cloud foundry environment.

entry.title: SAP MDG BP SOA - No confirmation message available when creating change request
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working on an inbound MDG SOA interface to replicate Business Partner(Customer Master) from Salesforce (sender system) to SAP MDG (receiving system) via middleware. This interface is being built to create a CR in MDG to create/update Business Partner - Customer.
We are using SOAP API service for Inbound - BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In.

The business Requirement is to send a response/confirmation message (via web service) to the sender system to inform whether CR creation was successful or failed with errors (including the error messages).

The standard Confirmation message is not triggering for MDG CR creation via BP SOAP inbound request. We tried to use BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateConfirmation_Out.

From SAP Note 2942297 we understand that the Confirmation message is not sent when creating a CR (staging area), instead, it is only sent when saving BP directly to the active area.

Regarding SAP Note 2847807 -  SAP has strictly advised not to use class CL_MDG_BP_BUPA_SI_IN and its method IF_MDG_UPLOAD_PROXY~SETUP_FOR_FILE_UPLOAD. Any invalid usage of this method creates inconsistent Change Requests and thus severe issues for your master data.

What other feasible solution options can you suggest for us to send back the confirmation message when creating MDG CRs?

If someone has implemented any such solution for a similar requirement, we'd appreciate your help a great deal.

Thank you in advance,

entry.title: Is it possible to ignore Textcollection from BusinessPartnerReplicationIn?
entry.content:
Hi,

in SAP Sales Cloud we write some Account Notes. But every time when SAP MDG send us an update (BusinessReplicationIn) the textcollection is initial. The account notes in Sales Cloud will be overwritten resp. deleted. 

How can we prevent this without CPI. MDG doesn't need the notes. It is possible to dont replicate the notes? I tried to catch this with SAP Cloud Applications Studio, but its not easy. Does somebody has any idea?

In BusinessPartnerReplicationOut is Textcollection filled.

KR

entry.title: Custom Edit Button in MDGM Search Screen
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a Custom Change button in MDGM search screen. 

Now i need to get a pop up with list of change request types for change process when i click on the change button.

Could you please suggest the next steps needed to be implemented.

Regards,

Raj

entry.title: in Auto Change Request Creation cl_usmd_model_ext API is not fetching the data
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

iam trying to create the change request using AUTO creation acquiring data from parent in this process iam not able to read data using cl_usmd_model_ext .

Could you please suggest.

entry.title: Has the SAP Master Data Integration service been deprecated?
entry.content: The SAP Master Data Integration service is no longer available in the SAP Discovery Centre Service Catalogue.  Has it been deprecated?

entry.title: Context Based Adaptation not working.
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

I need your help on the topic CBA in MDG. I've created a CBA for creating customizing only for some account group (Please find the attached).

But after creating a customizing for this CBA, it is applying to all of the customers (Including account group which is not mentioned in the CBA). Please let me know if I'm missing anything or doing anything incorrectly.

Thanks !

Regards,

Akhil

entry.title: Characteristic and Class Assignment UIBB Missing from Basic Data Details (MDG-M UI)
entry.content:
Hello,

Characteristic and Class Assignment tabs are missing from Basic Data Details in MDG-M UI. In order for them to be displayed, the users have to press on the Settings -> Reset to Default every time it is needed to maintain Class or Characteristics values from the mentioned UIBBs.

After this actions is done, both UIBBs are displayed at that time, but when a new session is opened the process should be started again (see the screenshots attached).

Is there a way to prevent hiding of both tabs, so it can be visible when Basic Data -> Details is opened at the first time?

Looking forward for any advice. Thanks and regards!

entry.title: Mass processing direct activation steps
entry.content:
Hi,

I see table MARC is updated with Direct Activation through Mass processing app in MDG but couldn’t find a BAPI or any other source as how table is updated.

Can anyone please provide some technical pointers how MARC is updated.

 

Thanks in advance.
